prompt: In image 1, which contains the web design wireframes, replace the four squares in the 'Our Team' section with the characters from images 2, 3, 4, and 5.
prompt_refined: Edit image 1, which contains a web design wireframe diagram. Locate the 'Our Team' section, positioned in the bottom-left panel of the wireframe layout. Within this 'Our Team' section, replace each of the four existing square placeholder elements (each containing a generic person icon) with one of the full-body character images provided in reference images 2, 3, 4, and 5. Ensure that all four characters are used, each occupying the space of one original placeholder square.
objects: 'Our Team' section in the bottom-left panel
Four square placeholder elements in the 'Our Team' section
Generic person icons (should not be present)
